name: FUNCTION_COMBINATIONS_BY_ORIGIN_TARGET
description: Functional category combinations by origin target. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t0:Target {symbol: $target})
MATCH (tp)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t:Target)-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]->(f:Functional_of_Target)
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair, collect(DISTINCT f.name) AS functional_categories, collect(DISTINCT a.name)[0..5] AS assignees
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: For the leading combinations from EU that contain TNFR2, what functional-of-target combinations are involved in those patents?
For the leading combinations from Other that contain CSF1R, what functional-of-target combinations are involved in those patents?
For the leading combinations from JP that contain CD36, what functional-of-target combinations are involved in those patents?
